calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Elisabeth Hanowsky appeared by zoom for and with James Carrasco, Jr. (Petitioner) by zoom.

The Court noted that no one was present to object to the petition. The Petition for Removal of Successor Co-Trustee is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Successor Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-14-2020 Continued To Jan-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
